text.title: Junior AI Co-Pilot Curriculum Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is a junior engineer joining (or already on) the team AND is an AI co-pilot the standard dev tool?

branch.question: Does the junior already hold an equivalent pass certificate from a prior employer?
Is a named mentor available for 30-min weekly slots for 6 weeks?

example.trace: new junior joining + team standardised on Claude Code + senior available → run-the-checklist
